title: sida cleisocalyx
intro: Sida cleisocalyx, also known as the Indian cord plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida cleisocalyx include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having antiseptic and antiviral properties. Traditionally, Sida cleisocalyx is used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
